---
title: Templates
description: Legal addendums, policy templates, and infrastructure-as-code.
sidebar:
  order: 0
---

Drop-in legal addendums (AWS, Salesforce, Azure, GCP), policy templates (AI governance, data classification, incident response), and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform sovereign landing zones).

Each template is paired with an explainer page describing when and how to use it, with download links to the raw artifact in the repo.
